title: Run Travis on latest released versions of go.
body:
Do not run travis builds with ostree.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body: FWIW, I'm doing similar changes in travis.yml in #305.  Except there I'm trying to ignore the tip failures.
Ok lets concentrate on Tom's but I think we should stop using ostree on Ubuntu for testing.
ok, will see how this current run goes.  Will circle back to kill ostree in ubuntu.
